_comment: KB domain — ready-to-run deploy config. Provider/model + paths + connector source + the operator's allow_list. The domain definition (goal, metric, actions) lives in the domain_pack code. Edit provider keys via .env.
_git_comment: Git versioning of the materialized KB - REQUIRED here because edit_entry is allow-listed: edit_entry is honestly reversible=false (it overwrites curated content), so the gate only auto-runs it when git makes it revertible (enabled + granularity=per_action + repo healthy/clean). repo_dir is data/kb (the markdown only; already gitignored in the source tree so the artifact repo nests cleanly). PRE-INITIALIZE it: `git init` inside data/kb. Set remote (e.g. origin) to also push; empty = local-only. If git is unavailable/dirty, edit_entry safely HOLDS for approval instead.
